items.meal_name: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
Tofu and Vegetable Curry with Rice
Canh Chua (Sour Fish Soup) with Rice

prep_instructions: Each kit day combines one grain, one protein, and one vegetable item (per-day totals stay under 800 mg sodium and within 45–60 g carbs).
All items are ready to eat — no heating required.
Rinse fruit before eating.
Add the protein on top of the grain; season with pepper or lemon — no added salt.
Refrigerate any opened items and use within 2 days.

prep_instructions: Each kit day combines one grain, one protein, and one vegetable item (per-day totals stay under 600 mg sodium and within 45–60 g carbs).
Microwave the grain cup for 90 seconds; let stand 1 minute.
Microwave the vegetable bag for 3–4 minutes until steaming.
Add the protein on top of the grain; season with pepper or lemon — no added salt.
Refrigerate any opened items and use within 2 days.
